entries.mnemonic: de(down)+fine(末端,范围)→定下范围→限定

senses.example: How do you define happiness?
senses.example_zh: 你怎样定义"幸福"？

senses.example: The section defines the extent of application of the Act.
senses.example_zh: 该条款用来限定该法令的适用范围。

senses.example: The winning entry was a short film for France.
senses.example_zh: 获奖作品是一部法国短片。

senses.example: The PLA made a triumphant entry into the town.
senses.example_zh: 解放军凯旋入城。

senses.example: You can leave your umbrella in the entry.
senses.example_zh: 雨伞可放于入口处。

senses.example: He made an entry in his diary every night.
senses.example_zh: 他每天晚上记日记。

senses.example: a sack of flour
senses.example_zh: 一袋面粉

senses.example: If you don't work harder you'll get the sack.
senses.example_zh: 如果你不更加卖力工作，就会被炒鱿鱼。

senses.example: the sack of Rome in 1527
senses.example_zh: 1527年罗马大洗劫

senses.example: He was sacked for being drunk.
senses.example_zh: 他因酗酒而被解雇。

senses.def_en: to rob of goods or valuables, esp. after capture
senses.example: The invaders sacked the city.
senses.example_zh: 侵略者把这座城市洗劫一空。

senses.example: Snack bars have become a familiar sight in most big cities.
senses.example_zh: 快餐店在多数大城市里随处可见。

senses.example: My steak is so tough that it tastes like shoe leather.
senses.example_zh: 我的牛排硬得像靴子上的皮革。

senses.example: A large portion of the company's profit goes straight back into new projects.
senses.example_zh: 公司的大部分利润直接投入到新的项目中。

senses.def_en: to divide into parts for distribution (~out)
senses.example: The money was portioned out among them.
senses.example_zh: 那笔钱被他们分了。

entries.mnemonic: meta(over, across)+phor(=fer 搬运)→一个词的含义搬到另一个词上→隐喻

senses.example: This metaphor is beyond all comprehension.
senses.example_zh: 这个隐喻难以理解。

entries.mnemonic: sign(标记)+ify(做)→做标记→表示…的意思

senses.def_en: to denote; be a sign of
senses.example: What do these marks signify? // A fever usually signifies that there is something wrong with the body.
senses.example_zh: 这些符号表示什么意思？发烧预示着身体有毛病。

senses.example: This book gives you a good idea of life in ancient Greece.
senses.example_zh: 这本书使你对古希腊生活有一个清楚的概念。

senses.example: That photo makes me look ancient!
senses.example_zh: 那张照片显得我很老！

senses.example: His ancestors came to America on the Mayflower.
senses.example_zh: 他的祖先是乘"五月花"号来到美洲的。

senses.example: Babbage's invention was the ancestor of the modern computer.
senses.example_zh: 巴比奇的发明是现代计算机的原型。
